alkylation reagent: alkylated with 55 mM iodoacetamide (IAM, Sigma-Aldrich Co. LLC, St. Louis, MA, USA)
cleavage agent: added into each sample at an enzyme to protein ratio of 1:50
enrichment method: lysine-acetylated peptides were enriched using an immune-affinity approach
fragmentation method: the mode of second-grade MS spectra was high-energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: connected to a Q Exactive mass spectrometer
ionization type: Peptides were ionized by a nano-electrospray ion source
labeling: A label-free approach was used to quantify the abundance of differentially acetylated proteins
reduction reagent: treated with 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT, Amersco, Solon, State of OH, USA)
